reviews.comment:
Mal atencion a los turistas uruguayos. Solo nos vendian la nafta que valía el doble,  no nos vendían la nafta super.  Nos dijeron que era una resolucion de YPF. Discriminacion total.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service for Uruguayan tourists. They only sold us gasoline that cost double, refusing to sell us premium. They told us it was a YPF policy. Complete discrimination.
